title: Mid-Level Instructional Designer at Doubtnut Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Instructional Designer at Doubtnut Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Join the Doubtnut Advisory Limited family as a Instructional Designer in Visakhapatnam. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Doubtnut Advisory Limited:
Doubtnut Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Doubtnut Advisory Limited!
